description_long: This is a pair of low-top sneakers featuring a striking combination of black, green, and gray colors. The shoes have a matte black toe cap and heel, with vibrant green side panels and matching green laces. The tongue and collar lining are also green, adding to the bold color contrast. A circular white emblem is visible on the outer side of each shoe, while the heel displays a rectangular patch with a graphic and text. The sole is white with a black stripe running along the side, and the overall design suggests a casual, sporty style suitable for urban environments.
description: A pair of low-top sneakers with black, green, and gray panels, green laces, and white soles, featuring graphic emblems on the side and heel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded gray toe caps, green laces, and the tops of the tongues with a white emblem.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the green side panel, circular white emblem, and the layered construction of the upper.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rectangular heel patches with graphics and the black heel counter.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the green side panel, white emblem, and the layered upper design.
attribute_logo: Circular white emblem on the outer side and a rectangular patch with graphics on the heel.
